'''marafa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cyanopsia|cyanopsia]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-r-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cyanopsia|cyanopsia]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| marafa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:mæræfæth|mæræfæth]] || [[word:mæræfæj|mæræfæj]] || [[word:mæræfæsh|mæræfæsh]] || [[word:mæræfæ|mæræfæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:mararafath|mararafath]] || [[word:mararafaj|mararafaj]] || [[word:mararafash|mararafash]] || [[word:mararafa|mararafa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:marafath|marafath]] || [[word:marafaj|marafaj]] || [[word:marafash|marafash]] || [[word:marafa|marafa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:maraffafth|maraffafth]] || [[word:maraffafj|maraffafj]] || [[word:maraffafsh|maraffafsh]] || [[word:maraffaf|maraffaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:marafatha|marafatha]] || [[word:marafaja|marafaja]] || [[word:marafasha|marafasha]] || [[word:marafaka|marafaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:marafath|marafath]] || [[word:marafaj|marafaj]] || [[word:marafash|marafash]] || [[word:marafa|marafa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:marafathal|marafathal]] || [[word:marafajal|marafajal]] || [[word:marafashal|marafashal]] || [[word:marafakal|marafakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:marafaathatha|marafaathatha]] || [[word:marafaajaja|marafaajaja]] || [[word:marafaashasha|marafaashasha]] || [[word:marafaaka|marafaaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:marafathan|marafathan]] || [[word:marafajan|marafajan]] || [[word:marafashan|marafashan]] || [[word:marafakan|marafakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:marafathaoro|marafathaoro]] || [[word:marafajaoro|marafajaoro]] || [[word:marafashaoro|marafashaoro]] || [[word:marafakaoro|marafakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|307a66b}}
